items.name: Shadebound Helmet
items.description:
This helmet's sleek black and purple design exudes an aura of mystery, while the cubic gems embedded on its surface shimmer with an otherworldly glow. The top of the helm, with its ethereal resemblance to a jellyfish, adds an intriguing touch, as if it holds secrets from the depths of the unknown. When worn, this helm commands attention and instills a sense of awe in all who behold it.
